response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, cloud technologies, and leadership, but lacks direct experience with C++ at the required 8-year level and large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. Their background is strong in web, mobile, and embedded systems, with some distributed systems exposure, but not in mid-to-large-scale cloud compute platforms. Leadership roles are present but not in cloud compute specifically.
strengths: Strong software development and architecture experience across multiple languages and domains (C++, D, JavaScript, TypeScript, etc.)
Proven leadership in technical mentoring, engineering best practices, and team collaboration (e.g., workshops, TDD, CI/CD)
Experience with distributed systems and high-performance applications (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec)
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (only 3 years listed vs. required 8 years)
Limited direct experience with cloud compute platforms or large-scale infrastructure at the required scale
No explicit experience in cloud architecture balancing short- and long-term needs or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers
